channel.title: Retrocomputing on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Retrocomputing on Arrans github.io

item.title: mihaip/infinite-mac
item.description: A classic Mac loaded with everything you’d want

item.title: jaromaz/MacintoshPi
item.description: MacintoshPi is a project that allows running full-screen versions of Apple’s Mac OS 7, Mac OS 8 and Mac OS 9 with sound, active online connection and modem emulation under Raspberry Pi.

item.title: mk6i/open-oscar-server
item.description: Self-hostable instant messaging server compatible with classic AIM and ICQ clients. (Independently developed, not affiliated with or endorsed by AOL) Formerly known as Retro AIM Server.
